issues.title: Avenger 100% fail (3/3) — Go version mismatch + golangci-lint missing, agent hits max_turns=25
issues.detail: All 3 Avenger runs failed with `terminal_reason: max_turns` (~$1.04/run avg, ~$3.13 total wasted). Root cause: `make fmt-go` fails with `go: go.mod requires go >= 1.26.3 (running go 1.24.13; GOTOOLCHAIN=local)` and `make lint` reports `golangci-lint is not installed`. Agent spends 25 turns trying to find/install missing tools, then exhausts budget. The PATH /opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.26.3/x64/bin works once discovered but agent shouldn't have to find it. Affected run IDs: 26372192847, 26371063845, 26369695031.

issues.title: awf-squid container unhealthy → docker compose up fails (2 runs)
issues.detail: Lockfile Statistics Analysis Agent (run 26371995223) and PR Sous Chef (run 26370977767) both failed with `dependency failed to start: container awf-squid is unhealthy → Failed to start containers: docker compose up -d --pull never exit 1`. Sandbox firewall container fails healthcheck. Both ran ~2-6m before exit. New today, not present yesterday.

issues.title: Codex (gpt-5.5) — `Unknown parameter: stream_options.include_usage` invalid_request_error
issues.detail: Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer run 26369636900 — error type changed from yesterday. Now: `{type: invalid_request_error, code: unknown_parameter, param: stream_options.include_usage}`. Still using model `gpt-5.5`. Codex CLI version sends parameter the API/proxy rejects. Suggests recent CLI bump or proxy strictness change.

issues.title: Smoke CI cancellations — 1 of 2 today (6-day pattern, much improved)
issues.detail: Run 26370904176 cancelled at 79s by external `##[error]The operation was canceled.` — push event superseded. Only 1 cancel today vs 3 yesterday. Persistence dropping but pattern still active.

issues.title: RESOLVED: Harness ENOENT set_output bug (37 runs yesterday, 0 today)
issues.detail: Yesterday's #1 cause of failures — copilot harness ENOENT on `_runner_file_commands/set_output_<uuid>`. Zero occurrences today after copilot CLI upgraded from 1.0.48 to 1.0.52. Smoke CI today shows: version=1.0.52.

issues.title: RESOLVED: copilot 1.0.48 anthropic-beta:context-1m-2025-08-07 header CAPIError 400
issues.detail: 17 runs hit this yesterday, 0 today. Copilot CLI upgraded 1.0.48→1.0.52 removed the rejected beta header. Confirmed by Smoke CI run 26370904176 aw_info.json: agent_version=1.0.52.

issues.title: RESOLVED: Design Decision Gate 20-turn cap (0 today, 3 runs all success)
issues.detail: All 3 Design Decision Gate runs today completed successfully — turn cap and permission denials not seen.

issues.title: RESOLVED: Daily News no longer in 24h window (no runs)
issues.detail: No Daily News run in last 24h — cannot confirm fix but no failure.

issues.title: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer 12.7m run, ~5.6M tokens — still single largest workflow
issues.detail: Run 26372823891 (claude) ran 12.7 min, ~13 action-minutes. Continues to lead workflow cost despite 30% reduction from 05-21 peak ($8.54 → $5.55 → ~$5).

issues.title: Firewall blocks dropped to 140/3450 (4%) from 594/3933 (15%) yesterday
issues.detail: Major improvement. Auto-Triage Issues 30% block rate observation persists from yesterday but volume way down. Track but de-escalate.

issues.title: PR Sous Chef execution drift — 0 to 49 turns (avg 25.2) across 6 runs today
issues.detail: Persistent observability finding. 1 of 6 failed today (squid issue, not drift). Drift remains noisy but no longer fatal.
